title: Beam Global Q3 2024 Revenue Decline Despite Margin Expansion
text: Beam Global reported third quarter 2024 operating results showing record margins despite challenging revenue environment. For quarter ended September 30, 2024, gross profit was $1.2 million, or 10.7% of sales, representing highest Q3 margin in company history and 9-point improvement year-over-year from 1.7% in Q3 2023. YTD gross margin reached 12.4%, up 11 points compared to 2023. Net Income was $1.3 million for Q3 2024 versus net loss of $3.6 million in Q3 2023. Company successfully reduced operating cash burn while expanding gross margins through improved manufacturing efficiency and product mix. Commercial customer revenue reached 47.9% of total revenue, up over 80% year-over-year. Record pipeline exceeded $200 million indicating strong future revenue potential. Company acquired Telcom for in-house power electronics manufacturing and launched four new products: BeamSpot, BeamBike, BeamPatrol, and BeamWell.
